compute: use the reduced-cover symbolic packet as the source model
adjoin H^2=u+2 only on the f3-plus component
record genus, component count, branch support, and visible involutions
cas_tasks.kill_if: the base is already generic and high-genus with no useful quotient
cas_tasks.name: Normalize the f3-plus B-u-H base
cas_tasks.promote_if: the f3-plus base has a low-genus/sourceable quotient carrying the selected sequence

compute: on F_A(u,v)=0 over the normalized f3-plus base, compute div(v+2) modulo squares
test whether gamma is a pullback from B/u/H, an H90 coboundary, a translate, or a quotient class
separate the generic transition class from the rho materialization orientation
cas_tasks.kill_if: gamma is a fresh independent half-cover on every useful quotient
cas_tasks.name: Extract gamma divisor/Kummer class
cas_tasks.promote_if: gamma is pullback/coboundary/low-genus/sourceable or controls more than one selected gate

compute: repeat the same transition after f4-plus to obtain the f5/f4 class
compare branch divisors and Kummer classes against gamma
ask GPU only for transition telemetry that includes these named class coordinates
cas_tasks.kill_if: f5/f4 is another unrelated fresh half-cover with geometric half-loss
cas_tasks.name: Compare with next gate
cas_tasks.promote_if: one recurrence/source law couples gamma to the next selected class

do_not_run: more visible B/H/tau relation scans without a new named class
GPU production from gamma buckets before raw-source accounting
treating rho/materialization as the moonshot class
using one-sided small-field f5/f6 tails as recurrence evidence

equations.actual_h90_quotient: for actual pair v0,v1: r=(v0+2)/(v1+2), r+1/r=u, (h+1/h)^2=u+2 when h^2=r
equations.f3_h90_layer: H^2 = u + 2; use p27_b_line_reduced_cover_symbolic_packet for the actual B-u source equations
equations.materialization: rho^2 = v^2 - 4; actual selected source keeps chi(v^2-4)=chi(v+A)=+1

gpu_task.kill_if: only conditional lift appears after paying a fresh classifier
gpu_task.promote_if: target survivors per raw source draw improves by at least 1.25x or a direct sampler avoids fresh half-loss
gpu_task.run_only_if: CAS names a quotient/class coordinate, or GPU telemetry can emit these coordinates cheaply

name: p27_b_line_gamma_class_handoff
purpose: CAS/GPU handoff for the remaining B-line moonshot: extract the Kummer class of gamma^2=v+2 over the f3-plus reduced layer and decide whether it is sourceable, recurrent, or a fresh half-cover.
